original_image_tags: Black-and-white photograph of a disc-shaped aircraft model with a central cockpit or hub and radial struts connecting to a circular outer wing/rim. It is suspended or mounted, appearing metallic. Caption reads:

elements.description: A newspaper clipping titled 'But the Navy Says "No": Saucers' New-Type Aircraft, Probably Navy, Magazine Says' by John G. Norris. It contains columns of typed text and one black-and-white photograph showing a model of a circular, disc-shaped aircraft with a central hub and multiple fins. Below the photograph, a caption reads 'Model of aircraft developed in 1948 and flown by the Navy under radio control - full-size craft never flew, the Navy has announced'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content: a black-and-white photograph of a disc-shaped aircraft model with a central hub and radial elements, but they differ on the quoted caption text without contradiction.
